operationName.title: Operation Name
operationName.description: The name of the GraphQL operation executed.

httpStatus.title: HTTP Status
httpStatus.description: The HTTP status code returned by the LeetCode API.

durationMs.title: Duration (ms)
durationMs.description: Time taken to execute the query in milliseconds.

data.title: Extracted Data
data.description: The actual JSON data extracted from LeetCode.

variables.title: Variables Used
variables.description: The GraphQL variables used for this operation.

errorMessages.title: Error Messages
errorMessages.description: Any error messages returned during the operation.

checkedAt.title: Checked At
checkedAt.description: Timestamp of when the query was executed.
